---
id: runtime-failure-mode-dependency-graph
title: Governance Runtime Failure-Mode Dependency Graph
owner: governance-steward
status: DRAFT
aspirational: true
---

# UIAO Governance Runtime Failure-Mode Dependency Graph

## How Failures Propagate Across the Governance Runtime

---

## Mermaid Diagram

[DIAGRAM-01: Top-down runtime dependency graph showing how GitHub events propagate through the Governance OS. Top labeled cluster "GitHub" contains four event-source boxes in a row: Issues, Pull Requests, CI Events, Workflow Triggers. Below GitHub, three intake boxes: Webhook Handler (receives Issues and Pull Requests), CI Validator (receives CI Events), Weekly Drift Workflow (receives Workflow Triggers). All three intake boxes converge into a single central box "Governance API". The Governance API connects bidirectionally to a database cylinder labeled "PostgreSQL" below it, and forwards data to a downstream "Governance Dashboard" box. Engineering blueprint style, neutral slate background, federal navy (#1F3A5F) for GitHub cluster, teal (#1A9E8F) for intake handlers, amber (#D4A017) for the Governance API and Dashboard, cylinder icon for the database, monospace labels, 16:9 landscape.]

---

## Failure Mode Annotations

### Webhook Handler Failure

- Event Loss: Missing SLA Updates
- Mislabeling: Wrong severity/SLA state applied

### CI Validator Failure

- Misclassification: Incorrect Drift Detection
- Outdated schema: Drift undetected

### Workflow Crash

- Undetected Drift: Weekly report missing

### DB Write Error

- SLA/Drift State Corruption

### Dashboard Stale Data

- Incorrect Governance Decisions

---

## ASCII Diagram

```
GitHub --> Webhook --> API --> DB --> Dashboard
     |--> CI --------^
     |--> Workflow --^

Failure Modes:
- Webhook loss       --> SLA timers wrong
- CI misclassify     --> Drift undetected or false drift
- Workflow crash     --> Weekly drift missing
- DB write failure   --> Corrupted SLA/drift state
- Dashboard stale    --> Incorrect governance decisions
```

> **SSOT Reference:** See /ssot/UIAO-SSOT.md
